_instructions.step_1_when_manifesto_published: When you receive the manifesto analysis JSON: (1) Add a 'topicScores' block to it (see ref_manifesto.json for the template), (2) save it as parties/ref_manifesto.json, (3) set 'manifestoFile' below to 'parties/ref_manifesto.json'. The website will then read all party info and scores directly from the manifesto file.
_instructions.step_2_fallback_scores: The 'topicScores' in THIS file are only used when no manifestoFile is set. They are pre-manifesto estimates. Once a manifestoFile is set, these are ignored.

score_scale.5: STRONGLY CHAMPIONS — A flagship commitment, central to their manifesto
score_scale.4: SUPPORTIVE — Included in their programme, a clear positive position
score_scale.3: NEUTRAL — No clear position, ambiguous, or not mentioned
score_scale.2: MILD OPPOSITION — Sceptical or would scale back
score_scale.1: STRONGLY OPPOSED — Explicitly against, would reverse or block

topicScores._note: Fallback estimates — only used if manifestoFile is missing or fails to load.
